@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@ - * Copyright (c) 2006, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved. + * Copyright (c) 2006, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved. @@ -34,1 +34,1 @@ - * Implements an output stream filter for uncompressing data stored in the + * Implements an output stream filter for decompressing data stored in the @@ -41,1 +41,1 @@ - * is {@linkplain #close closed}. + * is {@linkplain #close closed} or when {@link #finish()} is called. @@ -52,1 +52,0 @@ - * @author David R Tribble (david@tribble.com) @@ -63,1 +62,1 @@ - /** Output buffer for writing uncompressed data. */ + /** Output buffer for writing decompressed data. */ @@ -75,0 +74,4 @@ + // set to true if finish() was called and this InflaterOutputStream + // had created its own Inflater at construction time. + private boolean defaultInflaterClosed; + @@ -91,1 +94,1 @@ - * @param out output stream to write the uncompressed data to + * @param out output stream to write the decompressed data to @@ -107,1 +110,1 @@ - * @param out output stream to write the uncompressed data to + * @param out output stream to write the decompressed data to @@ -123,1 +126,1 @@ - * @param out output stream to write the uncompressed data to + * @param out output stream to write the decompressed data to @@ -146,1 +149,1 @@ - * Writes any remaining uncompressed data to the output stream and closes + * Writes any remaining decompressed data to the output stream and closes @@ -149,0 +152,3 @@ + * @implSpec If not already closed, this method calls {@link #finish()} before + * closing the underlying output stream. + * @@ -153,2 +159,10 @@ - if (!closed) { - // Complete the uncompressed output + if (closed) { + return; + } + IOException toThrow = null; + // Complete the decompressed output + try { + finish(); + } catch (IOException ioe) { + toThrow = ioe; + } finally { @@ -156,2 +170,0 @@ - finish(); - } finally { @@ -159,1 +171,6 @@ - closed = true; + } catch (IOException ioe) { + if (toThrow == null) { + toThrow = ioe; + } else if (toThrow != ioe) { + toThrow.addSuppressed(ioe); + } @@ -161,0 +178,4 @@ + closed = true; + } + if (toThrow != null) { + throw toThrow; @@ -165,2 +186,2 @@ - * Flushes this output stream, forcing any pending buffered output bytes to be - * written. + * Flushes this output stream, writing any pending buffered decompressed data to + * the underlying output stream. @@ -187,1 +208,1 @@ - // Write the uncompressed output data block + // Write the decompressed output data block @@ -203,3 +224,2 @@ - * Finishes writing uncompressed data to the output stream without closing - * the underlying stream. Use this method when applying multiple filters in - * succession to the same output stream. + * Writes out any pending buffered decompressed data to the underlying output stream, + * without closing the underlying stream. @@ -207,2 +227,9 @@ - * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs or this stream is already - * closed + * @implSpec This method calls {@link #flush()} to write any pending buffered + * decompressed data. + *

+ * If this {@code InflaterOutputStream} was created without specifying + * a {@linkplain Inflater decompressor}, then this method closes the decompressor + * that was created at construction time. The {@code InflaterOutputStream} cannot + * then be used for any further writes. + * + * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs or this stream is already closed @@ -217,0 +244,1 @@ + this.defaultInflaterClosed = true; @@ -221,1 +249,1 @@ - * Writes a byte to the uncompressed output stream. + * Writes a byte to the decompressed output stream. @@ -237,1 +265,1 @@ - * Writes an array of bytes to the uncompressed output stream. + * Writes an array of bytes to the decompressed output stream. @@ -254,0 +282,7 @@ + // check if this InflaterOutputStream had constructed its own + // Inflater at construction time and has been + // rendered unusable for writes due to finish() being called + // on it. + if (usesDefaultInflater && defaultInflaterClosed) { + throw new IOException("Inflater closed"); + } @@ -255,1 +290,1 @@ - throw new NullPointerException("Null buffer for read"); + throw new NullPointerException("Null input buffer"); @@ -262,1 +297,1 @@ - // Write uncompressed data to the output stream + // Write decompressed data to the output stream
